label: plain_text
text:
This
figure
has
lines of two
different
unit lengths. Measure
the
lengths of a red line and a blue line; are t
they s
same? We will call t
the
red lines —straight lines and the blue 
e lines— diagonal lines. So, the
perimeter of this
triangle is 6 straight
t units + 3 diagonal
units. We
can write this in a short form as: 6s + 3d units.
